galleryPage.heading:
Behind
the scenes
galleryPage.intro: Everything that doesn't make it into the final cut. Early mornings on set, last-minute decisions, the trips before the shoots. The part of the job you rarely get to show — and yet it's often where everything actually happens.

aboutPage.heading:
Tullio
Philippe
aboutPage.intro: Born in Paris, Philippe Tullio discovered his passion for filmmaking through acting — a dual training that shaped a singular approach to direction.
aboutPage.actingBody: He moved to Los Angeles to study the Meisner and Stanislavski methods under Joanne Baron, one of Hollywood's most respected acting coaches — whose clients include Halle Berry and Leslie Mann. This immersion in performance shaped an intimate understanding of actor direction.
aboutPage.filmschoolBody1: Tullio's passion for film led him to join the London Film Academy in 2007, where he honed his skills in directing.
aboutPage.filmschoolBody2: At the Academy, he met Lincoln Ascott, a teacher who inspired him and convinced him to work as an actor and assistant director on three short films.
aboutPage.kcitizenDesc:
Drama | 29 min | 2010

Charles Taylor, 65, is one of the richest and most powerful men in the world today. He heads a media empire through which he controls and manipulates billions of minds. One night, he meets Mindy, 24, who turns his world upside down. His relationship with the world's most influential man pushes Charles down the rabbit hole — a cathartic journey of deep introspection with his younger self in 1969. Here, he discovers he is a product of his environment, like any other man: a product shaped by his father.

If you had the chance to go back in time, what would you say to yourself?
aboutPage.kcitizenBlock: At the age of 25, Tullio produced and directed his first medium-length film, "K-CITIZEN," which tackled the excesses of the American dream. He followed this with a satirical comedy titled "Jesus is Back and He's Not Happy."
aboutPage.jesusDesc: A satirical comedy about Jesus returning to the modern world.
aboutPage.scarfaceDesc: A drama inspired by real events, "Scarface Generation" follows an Afghan multimillionaire living in Los Angeles who squanders his $100 million fortune in just six months.
aboutPage.jayaDesc: An action film co-written with Jeremy Minuit. Teaser and mood board available.
aboutPage.crakoDesc: A horror and parkour movie featuring David Belle, the founder of parkour. Currently in development.
aboutPage.covidDesc: During the COVID-19 lockdown, Tullio wrote "HORS-JEU," an offbeat series about a modern soccer anti-hero.
aboutPage.commercialDesc: Alongside his writing work, Tullio produced and directed a commercial for the brand ABACO Paris, featuring actor and ex-professional boxer Stéphane Ferrara.
